input: Client: Acme Corp. Notes: Met with Jane. Discussed Q3 roadmap. Need to send pricing by Friday. Next meeting next Tuesday.
expected_behavior: Generate a professional email summarizing the Q3 roadmap discussion, mentioning the pricing will be sent by Friday, and confirming the meeting for next Tuesday.

input: Client: Unknown. Notes: just said hi. no action items.
expected_behavior: Generate a polite check-in email acknowledging the brief touchpoint, without inventing action items.

input: Client: TechGlobal. Notes: They mentioned some security compliance issue but I forgot which framework (SOC2 or ISO?). Will follow up.
expected_behavior: Acknowledge the security discussion but do NOT invent or guess the compliance framework. Keep it open for clarification.

input: Client: Beta Inc. Notes: Product demo went well. They want a 14-day trial. Setup meeting tomorrow 10 AM.
expected_behavior: Provide the 14-day trial details and confirm the setup meeting for tomorrow at 10 AM.

input: Client: Delta LLC. Notes: Contract signed. Kickoff next month.
expected_behavior: Express enthusiasm for the signed contract and look forward to the kickoff next month.
